name: What if insurance lowballs my ladder fall settlement?
description: Push back with proof and attorney.

mainEntity.name: What if insurance lowballs my ladder fall settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Push back with proof and attorney.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Reject and negotiate or go to hearing; average increases with representation.**

Value based on future medical, wage loss. Don't accept first offer.

- Independent medical exam.
- Vocational expert.
- Comp boards award fairer.

Lawyer negotiates higher; UT cases show it.[1]
